src: ScienceClaw is a personal research assistant built with LangChain DeepAgents and AIO Sandbox infrastructure, adopting a completely new architecture beyond OpenClaw. It offers stronger security, better transparency, and a more user-friendly experience.
ja: ScienceClawはLangChain DeepAgentsとAIO Sandboxインフラで構築された個人向けリサーチアシスタント。OpenClawを超える全く新しいアーキテクチャを採用し、より強固なセキュリティ、優れた透明性、使いやすい体験を提供
